_about: Image manifest for the Axis tool. Captions display on the back of each card (flip), never the front. No axis position is recorded here on purpose: the tool must not pre-answer the question it asks. File names are placeholders to match to your low-res image files. Shuffle the images array on load so no order is implied.

source.credit: © the respective artists. Shown here at low resolution for study only. To see the work as it should be seen, visit Autograph's gallery in London and explore their collection and exhibitions online.
